name: prospector
description: Prospector — monorepo scripts (frontend Next.js + backend FastAPI)

scripts.worker:general: cd backend && python -m celery -A workers.celery_app worker -Q capture,enrich,cadence,dispatch -P solo -c 1 --loglevel=info
scripts.worker:content: cd backend && python -m celery -A workers.celery_app worker -Q content,content-engagement -P solo -c 1 --loglevel=info
